name: primary_care_outpatient_in_person

params.message: I've been so tired the last six weeks. Even small tasks at work exhaust me, and my headaches are getting worse.

handover.plan: Follow local pathway and monitor response.

review_of_systems.cardiac: Exertional pressure-like chest discomfort relieved by rest
